name: reader-hotkeys-mapper
description: Browser extension for keyboard-first manga reading, local site mapping and chapter navigation.

scripts.build: bun build src/entries/background.ts --outfile background.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/content.ts --outfile content.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/options.ts --outfile options.js --target browser --format iife && bun build src/entries/popup.ts --outfile popup.js --target browser --format iife
